headline: Regional bank shares rebound after deposit outflow concerns ease
context: A regional bank ETF rises after several banks report stabilizing deposits, but analysts still warn that commercial real estate exposure remains a risk.

headline: Cloud software company cuts revenue guidance
context: A cloud software stock falls after management lowers annual revenue guidance and reports slower enterprise spending.

headline: Gold miners rally as rate-cut expectations increase
context: Gold miner shares rise after lower inflation data increases expectations of future rate cuts.
